full_text:
Shisun Meng (Wenshi) 士孫萌 (文始)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shisun Meng (士孫萌), styledWenshi (文始), was born in Youfufeng. Friend of Wang Can, given peerage by Emperor Xian. Shisun Meng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.
